data.title: BlackRock’s Q4 earnings shows best performance in its history, as AUM surpass $14 trillion
data.description:
BlackRock just closed out 2025 with $14. 04 trillion under management. That’s the biggest figure the company has ever recorded. It’s also the first time any asset manager has passed the $14 trillion mark. But while that number grabbed attention, profit actually dropped in the last three months of the year because of higher costs. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrocks-q4-earnings-aum-top-14-trillion/

data.title: BNB completed its 34th quarterly burn, destroying $1.277 billion worth of BNB.
data.description: According to official sources, the BNB Foundation has completed its first quarterly token burn in 2026, burning a total of 1,371,803.77 BNB (including 100.1 BNB for Vanguard), equivalent to approximately $1.277 billion at the time. This burn was completed automatically, with the goal of gradually reducing the total supply to 100 million BNB. The current total supply is 136 million BNB.

data.title: Bitmine staked another 154,300 ETH today, bringing its total staked ETH to 1.68 million.
data.description: Bitmine staked another 154,304 ETH today, bringing its total staked ETH to 1.68 million, worth $5.62 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Nasdaq Decline Contrasts with Russell 2000 Performance, Indicating Rising Risk Appetite
data.description: According to Odaily, Garrett Jin, known as '1011 Insider Whale,' shared insights on the X platform regarding recent market movements. He noted that while the Nasdaq index experienced a decline, the Russell 2000 index performed exceptionally well. This classic risk preference rotation suggests an increase in risk appetite, with funds continuing to flow into high-beta crypto assets. Both BTC and ETH are in an upward trend, with potential for further gains.

data.title: The London Stock Exchange Group launches a blockchain-based 24/7 tokenized bank deposit settlement platform.
data.description: The London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) today announced the launch of its Digital Clearinghouse (LSEG DiSH), a platform designed to enable 24/7 instant settlement of tokenized deposits by commercial banks using blockchain technology. LSEG DiSH supports multi-currency and cross-network settlement, providing dynamic intraday liquidity management, simultaneous settlement (PvP/DvP), and risk mitigation capabilities, and is operated by LSEG's Post Trade Solutions division. The platform can not only complete settlements on its own ledger but also act as a notary to support settlements on connected networks. Currently, LSEG has completed a proof-of-concept (PoC) on the Canton Network with a consortium including software company Digital Asset and several financial institutions, successfully implementing intraday repurchase transactions across currencies and asset types. In addition, LSEG previously launched a blockchain platform for private equity funds in September 2025.

data.title: A whale closed out its long positions in HYPE, incurring a total loss of $8.09 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xBd8...971d) closed its 5x leveraged long position in HYPE, incurring a loss of $7.18 million. This whale has now accumulated losses of $8.09 million and has withdrawn the remaining funds from HyperLiquid.

data.title: Trump Backs Off Firing Powell for Now as Fed Faces Criminal Probe and Stubborn Inflation
data.description:
President Trump signals a "holding pattern" regarding Fed Chair Jerome Powell as the Justice Department investigates the central bank’s $2. 5 billion renovation.

The post Trump Backs Off Firing Powell for Now as Fed Faces Criminal Probe and Stubborn Inflation first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: OKX will launch LIT/USDT spot trading.
data.description: OKX will launch LIT/USDT spot trading, with the following schedule: LIT deposits open: January 15, 2026, 19:00 (UTC+8); Pre-order period: January 15, 2026, 22:30 to 23:30 (UTC+8); LIT/USDT spot trading opens: January 15, 2026, 23:30 (UTC+8); LIT withdrawals open: January 16, 2026, 01:30 (UTC+8).

data.title: Nvidia Invests in AI Startup Harmonic
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Nvidia has made an investment in Harmonic, a startup focused on mathematical artificial intelligence. This move highlights Nvidia's ongoing interest in expanding its reach within the AI sector.
